title: Vertiv: 2023 EPS Growth Expected After A Challenging Year
text: Economic growth is currently robust, but there are real recession risks looming which could hurt domestic small and mid-caps. One cyclical Industrial sector company has an upbeat outlook, though, and its valuation has improved.
